decision_summary.rationale: Log group already has optimal 30-day retention policy with minimal ingestion (0.31GB/month) and low cost ($0.15/month). No cost savings opportunity exists for compliant resources.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The CloudWatch log group for the order-service Lambda function already implements the required 30-day retention policy. With only 0.31GB of logs ingested monthly, the current configuration balances compliance with cost efficiency. No operational risks exist since the retention period meets regulatory requirements and the low ingestion volume avoids storage overruns.
